hero.title: Stories of Change
hero.subtitle: Discover how communities across Europe are adapting to climate challenges through practical, place-based action.

cards.title: Cultivating resilience in the heart of Turin
cards.excerpt: Through urban agriculture and community-led initiatives, Gabriella Esposito is helping citizens reconnect with nature and reimagine greener, more resilient neighbourhoods.

cards.title: Building resilience through cooperation
cards.excerpt: Strong partnerships and shared decision-making are at the heart of Maria del Carmen Vázquez's vision for resilient fisheries and thriving coastal communities.

cards.title: Healing connections with the forest
cards.excerpt: Lorena Parada is showing how reconnecting people with nature can breathe new life into rural communities, turning forests into spaces for wellbeing, learning and resilience.

cards.title: Where tradition meets transformation
cards.excerpt: Joana Saavedra represents a new generation of winegrowers, showing how Atlantic communities can preserve their heritage while embracing innovation and adapting to a changing climate.
